titles.title: God Is Here to Bless Us

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is here, and that to bless us With the Spirit’s quickening power: See, the cloud already bending, Waits to drop the grateful shower.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let it come, O Lord, we pray Thee, Let the shower of blessing fall We are waking, we are waiting, Oh, revive the hearts of all.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God is here! We feel His presence In this consecrated place, But we need the soul refreshing Of His free, unbounded grace.
